race.comment: HANUMAN (1) resumes for the new yard and brings strong form from Victoria. Has placed 2/2 fresh in better Maidens and the blinkers are applied for the first time. JVO is engaged and he'd only have to be near best to take this out. ZOYSIA (5) was expected to win here first-up but looked a run short. Has switched rom the Waller yard and is sure to have come on. Draws low and Nestor sticks. Has claims at a decent price. CAPTAINTHUNDERBOLT (6) debuts and has showed enough at the trials to suggest he's a chance. Has the blinkers on for the first time but a wide gate requires managing. SUNDAY LEMONADE (14) resumes and the local showed enough at the track on debut to consider naturally improved. MR GUNNA DO (3) went close this track/trip 9 days ago and include at a big price.
